steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The subject is the singular noun phrase 'Mathematician Grigori Perelman.' The parenthetical 'in conjunction with...' modifier is bracketed by commas and does not change the subject's number. The blank is the auxiliary verb before 'credited.'

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'is': singular present auxiliary — agrees with the singular subject Perelman. ✓
  • Choice B — 'are': plural present form — does not agree with the singular subject. ✗
  • Choice C — 'are being': plural progressive — does not agree with the singular subject. ✗
  • Choice D — 'have been': uses the plural auxiliary 'have' instead of the singular 'has been' — does not agree with the singular subject. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
